'''Sakul Ondondanax''' was a [[Swoop/Legends|swoop]] racer on [[Manaan/Legends|Manaan]] who reached the title of Manaan Sector Champion during the [[Jedi Civil War]]. Ondondanax was present at the [[Tarisian Season Opener|Season Opener]] on [[Taris/Legends|Taris]] in [[3956 BBY]] and was killed shortly afterward when the forces of [[Darth Malak]] [[Destruction of Taris|bombarded the planet]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' {{1stm}}
